tagline: 互动网页课件 — 随堂测验 · 浏览器 Python 实验 · 每页留言 · 可选语音讲解

courses.title: Python for AI Research
courses.subtitle: 从 Python 基础、数据处理到 AI 科研项目展示的 15 节互动课程。

decks.title: Pandas Series 与时间数据
decks.summary: 导入 Pandas/NumPy，创建 Series，使用标签/位置索引，并解析与生成日期时间。

decks.title: Pandas DataFrame 数据分析
decks.summary: 构建、检查、筛选、转换、汇总、排序和组合 DataFrame。

decks.title: 条件判断与程序分支
decks.summary: 布尔表达式、缩进、if/elif/else、紧凑 if 与三元表达式。

decks.title: for、while 与循环控制
decks.summary: 用 for/range 遍历，用 while 重复到条件改变，并用 break/continue 控制循环。

decks.title: 定义、调用与返回函数
decks.summary: 用 def 封装任务，区分参数与实参，并用 return 交回可复用结果。

decks.title: 高级参数、作用域与函数文档
decks.summary: 类型提示、关键字参数、local/global/nonlocal scope、docstring 与函数设计理由。

decks.title: List、2D List 与 Tuple
decks.summary: 创建、访问、修改和遍历 list；用 2D list 表示表格；用 tuple/unpacking 表示固定记录。

decks.title: Dictionary 与词频项目
decks.summary: 用 key-value 建模，访问、增改、删除和遍历字典，并完成库存与词频项目。

courses.title: Python for AI Research (English)
courses.subtitle: A 15-class Python-first path from coding basics to small AI research projects.

decks.title: Pandas Series and Time Data
decks.summary: Import Pandas/NumPy, create Series, index by label or position, and work with datetimes.

decks.title: Pandas DataFrame Analysis
decks.summary: Construct, inspect, filter, transform, aggregate, sort, and combine DataFrames.

decks.title: Conditions and Branching
decks.summary: Boolean expressions, indentation, if/elif/else, compact if, and conditional expressions.

decks.title: for, while, and Loop Control
decks.summary: Iterate with for/range, repeat with while, and control loops with break and continue.

decks.title: Defining, Calling, and Returning
decks.summary: Encapsulate tasks with def, distinguish parameters from arguments, and return reusable results.

decks.title: Advanced Arguments, Scope, and Documentation
decks.summary: Type hints, keyword arguments, local/global/nonlocal scope, docstrings, and reasons to use functions.

decks.title: Lists, 2D Lists, and Tuples
decks.summary: Create, access, update, and traverse lists; model tables with 2D lists; represent fixed records with tuples and unpacking.

decks.title: Dictionaries and a Word-Frequency Project
decks.summary: Model key-value data, access/update/delete/iterate dictionaries, and build inventory and word-frequency projects.
